- Initializing project context.
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 1]: Initialized Next.js foundation in `psz_main_web` with Tailwind setup, two-font typography, responsive global Navbar/Footer, and external Commonwealth bridge link wiring via env-configurable URL. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Footer]: Fixed Next.js server runtime error by removing `onSubmit` event handler from newsletter placeholder in `Footer` and keeping it non-interactive for server component compatibility. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 2]: Added typed models (`Program`, `Article`, `ImpactStat`), dummy datasets, async services with shared 500ms delay utility, and schema documentation alignment for future Supabase migration. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 3]: Implemented modular homepage assembly in `src/app/page.tsx` with Hero, mission overview, programs preview, framer-motion impact counters, join CTA, and news preview; wired all data through Phase 2 service layer. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 4]: Added Programs and News hubs with category filters/search, dynamic `[slug]` detail pages with metadata generation, related content/share affordances, and service-layer slug fetch helpers. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 5]: Completed SEO and semantic polish with strict metadata for layout/static pages, improved dynamic metadata consistency, semantic heading refinements in hub components, and verified optimized Next `Image` usage with descriptive alt text. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [Handover/Docs]: Added comprehensive developer handover documentation for main web completion and Commonwealth kickoff, and added global footer developer credit text (`Development by 04`). (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [Commonwealth/Planning]: Added detailed phase-by-phase implementation roadmap at `docs/commonwealth/psz_commonwealth_execution_plan.md`, locking cycle scope (mock checkout, guest flow, local cart persistence, EN-first l10n scaffold) and defining architecture, routing, QA, and documentation gates for execution. (COPILOT_LOG)
